inputs.label: Purchase Price (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Initial acquisition cost of the vehicle, including taxes and fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial acquisition cost of the vehicle, including taxes and fees.

inputs.label: Residual Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the vehicle at the end of the holding period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated market value of the vehicle at the end of the holding period.

inputs.label: Holding Period (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years the vehicle will be owned and used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of years the vehicle will be owned and used.

inputs.label: Annual Mileage (miles)
inputs.businessContext: Average miles driven per year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average miles driven per year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Accounting method used to allocate depreciation expense over the holding period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Accounting method used to allocate depreciation expense over the holding period.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency (MPG)
inputs.businessContext: Miles per gallon, used to estimate fuel cost and total cost of ownership.

businessContext_i18n.en: Miles per gallon, used to estimate fuel cost and total cost of ownership.

inputs.label: Fuel Price per Gallon (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Current or projected average fuel price for the vehicle's fuel type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current or projected average fuel price for the vehicle's fuel type.

inputs.label: Annual Insurance Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Yearly premium for comprehensive and liability coverage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Yearly premium for comprehensive and liability coverage.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate used for net present value calculations (cost of capital).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual discount rate used for net present value calculations (cost of capital).

inputs.label: Vehicle Type
inputs.businessContext: Category of vehicle, influences depreciation curves and maintenance patterns.

businessContext_i18n.en: Category of vehicle, influences depreciation curves and maintenance patterns.

rules.message: Residual value must be less than purchase price.
Holding period must be at least 1 year.
Fuel efficiency must be greater than 0.
Discount rate must be between 0% and 30%.

thresholds.message: Annual depreciation rate exceeds 25% — consider shorter holding period or different vehicle type.
Total cost of ownership exceeds 150% of purchase price — review operating expenses.
Residual value is less than 20% of purchase price — high depreciation risk.
